purpose: Absorb durable AI work-loop patterns into OPL-native workstream, stage attempt, goal oracle, heartbeat, artifact review, memory ref, receipt, and read-model boundaries without importing an external runtime or treating reference prose as truth.

rules: A thread is an operator continuity and steering view over admitted workstream and stage attempt refs.
A thread is not a domain runtime, scheduler, truth store, memory store, or artifact authority.
Thread pinning may influence App/operator attention ordering but cannot change owner route, stage admission, provider state, or domain verdict.

owner_surface: domain-owned quality gate or owner receipt
rules: A goal must expose a real oracle, such as tests, receipt refs, human gate decision, independent reviewer gate, owner receipt, typed blocker, or stop decision.
Goal completion cannot be inferred from a plan being implemented, a provider run ending, a thread becoming quiet, a worklist being zero, or a read model being visible.
Weak or missing oracle becomes advisory warning, typed blocker, human gate, or route-back depending on launch safety and authority impact.
Heartbeat is a liveness, monitor, and steering surface over a stage attempt or operator workstream.
Heartbeat can schedule checks, surface decision points, request payloads, or route to safe actions.
Heartbeat cannot write domain truth, send irreversible external communication, mutate artifacts, accept memory writeback, or sign owner receipt unless routed through the owning authority surface.
Artifacts should be reviewable as first-class App/operator objects with refs, previews, comments, and route-back targets.
OPL may display and route artifact refs but must not read artifact body to infer domain quality, mutate body without domain authority, or claim artifact ready.
Review comments and side-panel annotations are steering inputs until converted into admitted stage work, owner receipt, typed blocker, human gate, or artifact mutation receipt.
Memory adoption is refs-first: OPL can index, route, project, and verify receipt refs.
Domain owners keep memory body, memory semantics, accept/reject decision, and evidence authority.
Memory ref visibility cannot be promoted into evidence truth, quality verdict, artifact readiness, or production readiness.

surface_budget_classification.new_default_surface_reason: patterns map to existing launch safety, authority boundary, evidence/replay/audit/route-back, and App/operator consumption surfaces
